overall.description: A maritime navigation simulation showing nighttime ship operation during a storm. The vessel approaches coastal waters as indicated by the sonar display, with a lightning strike briefly illuminating the ocean surface ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge facing open ocean

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel on a steady course through deep open water

entered.detail: the bow of the ship visible through the bridge window with red navigation lights
dark calm sea extending to the horizon
metal railing and window structure of the ship's bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady nighttime transit through deep ocean waters from the ship's bridge. The vessel bow is visible ahead with navigation lights, while the radar and sonar displays show clear deep water ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal approach with shallow water detection

events.description: sonar display shows rising seabed and landmass appearing on the right side of the screen

agents.ego_description: maintaining course while monitoring the sonar display for depth changes and coastal proximity

entered.detail: brown shaded area on the sonar display indicating shallow water or land approaching from the right

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues forward as the sonar begins detecting a rising seabed, with the brown landmass indicator growing on the right side of the depth display. The ocean remains dark and calm outside the bridge windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: close coastal navigation during electrical storm

events.description: bright lightning strike illuminates the ocean surface and horizon ahead of the vessel

agents.ego_description: navigating through shallow coastal waters with land proximity indicated on sonar

entered.detail: brief bright illumination of the ocean surface from lightning strike

segments.scene_description: A lightning flash briefly illuminates the ocean ahead as the vessel continues its approach to the coastline. The sonar display shows the landmass now significantly closer on the right side, indicating shallow water navigation conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward transit from a ship's bridge as the vessel moves from the deep, open ocean toward a nearing coastline. It begins with a steady view of the bow and navigation lights cutting through the nighttime darkness, while the radar and sonar displays indicate clear, deep waters ahead. As the vessel continues forward, the sonar display begins to shift, showing a brown landmass indicator that grows on the right side as the seabed rises. The scene then intensifies when a sudden flash of lightning briefly illuminates the dark ocean surface, coinciding with the sonar showing the landmass significantly closer. The shot concludes as the vessel enters shallow water navigation conditions, with the coastline now looming on the right side of the display.
